sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 로빈후드, 2026년 1분기 매출 10억 7,000만 달러 및 주당순이익 0.38달러 기록

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 총 순매출은 전년 동기 대비 15% 증가한 10억 7,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.
희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 전년 동기 대비 3% 증가한 0.38달러를 달성했습니다.
로빈후드 골드 구독자 수는 전년 대비 36% 증가하여 430만 명을 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 주식 및 옵션 거래량의 두 자릿수 성장과 예측 시장, 선물, 지수 옵션의 기록적인 거래량이 실적을 견인했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 순이익은 전년 동기 대비 3% 증가한 3억 4,600만 달러를 기록했습니다.
조정 EBITDA는 전년 동기 대비 14% 증가한 5억 3,400만 달러를 기록했습니다.
순이자 수익은 이자 수익 자산의 성장으로 전년 대비 24% 증가한 3억 5,900만 달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 4월 거래량 추세와 월간 순입금액 흐름이 2분기 실적에 미칠 영향 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q12026robinhoodexhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Robinhood Reports First Quarter 2026 Results Revenues up 15% year-over-year to $1.07 billion Diluted EPS up 3% year-over-year to $0.38 Net Deposits were $18 billion, a 22% annualized growth rate Robinhood Gold Subscribers grew 36% year-over-year to a record 4.3 million MENLO PARK, Calif. – April 28, 2026 – Robinhood Markets, Inc. (“Robinhood”) (NASDAQ: HOOD) today announced financial results for the first quarter of 2026, which ended March 31, 2026. "Driven by our relentless product velocity and innovation, Robinhood is increasingly positioned at the center of our customers’ financial lives, just as we enter the early innings of the Great Wealth Transfer," said Vlad Tenev, Chairman and CEO of Robinhood. “In Q1, customers remained engaged and rapidly adopted new pro  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.07 billion = 10억 7,000만 달러; $18 billion = 180억 달러; 4.3 million = 430만 달러; $1.07 = 1.07달러; $0.38 = 0.38달러; $18 = 18달러; 20 percent = 20%.

te, double digit growth across equities and options, and record volumes for prediction markets, futures, and index options," said Shiv Verma, Chief Financial Officer of Robinhood. "And Q2 is off to a good start in April, as equity and option trading volumes are on track to be the highest month of the year, and even with tax season, net deposits are approximately $5 billion month-to-date. We believe there are massive opportunities ahead as we invest for the long term, ship products faster than ever to customers, and deliver value for shareholders.” First Quarter Results • Total net revenue s increased 15% y ear-over-year to $1.07 billion. ◦ Transaction-based revenues increased 7% year-over-year to $623 million , primarily driven by other transaction reven  Normalized numeric aliases: $5 billion = 50억 달러; $1.07 billion = 10억 7,000만 달러; $623 million = 6억 2,300만 달러; $147 million = 1억 4,700만 달러; $260 million = 2억 6,000만 달러; $5 = 5달러; $1.07 = 1.07달러; $623 = 623달러; $260 = 260달러; $147 = 147달러.

s revenue o f $82 million, up 46%, partially offset by cryptocurrencies revenue of $134 million, down 47%. ◦ Net interest revenues increased 24% year-over-year to $359 million , primarily driven by growth in interest-earning assets, partially offset by lower short-term interest rates and securities lending activity. ◦ Other revenues increased 57% year-over-year to $85 million, primarily driven by Robinhood Gold subscription revenue of $50 million up 32%. • Net income increased 3% year-over-year to $346 million, compared to Q1 2025. • Diluted earnings per share (“EPS”) increased 3% to $0.38, compared to Q1 2025. • Total operating expenses increased 18% year-over-year to $656 mil  Normalized numeric aliases: $82 million = 8,200만 달러; $134 million = 1억 3,400만 달러; $359 million = 3억 5,900만 달러; $85 million = 8,500만 달러; $50 million = 5,000만 달러; $346 million = 3억 4,600만 달러; $656 million = 6억 5,600만 달러; $82 = 82달러; $359 = 359달러; $656 = 656달러; $85 = 85달러; $50 = 50달러; $346 = 346달러; $0.38 = 0.38달러.

14% year-over-year to $607 million, which includes $14 million of costs related to Rothera and Trump Accounts. • Adjusted EBITDA (non-GAAP) increased 14% year-over-year to $534 million. • Funded Customers increased by 1.7 million, or 6%, year-over-year to 27.4 million. ◦ Investment Accounts increased by 2.1 million, or 8%, year-over-year to 29.1 million. • Total Platform Assets increased 39% year-over-year to $307 billion, driven by continued Net Deposits, higher equity valuations, and acquired assets. • Net Deposits were $17.7 billion, an annualized growth rate of 22% relative to Total Platform Assets at the end of Q4 2025.
